scripts.build: pnpm run build:dataview && pnpm run build:whiteboard && pnpm run build:whiteboard:app
scripts.build:whiteboard: pnpm --filter @whiteboard/core run build && pnpm --filter @whiteboard/engine run build && pnpm --filter @whiteboard/editor run build && pnpm --filter @whiteboard/react run build && pnpm --filter @whiteboard/collab run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:dataview && pnpm run typecheck:whiteboard
scripts.typecheck:dataview: pnpm -C dataview run typecheck && pnpm -C dataview run demo:typecheck
scripts.typecheck:whiteboard: pnpm --filter @whiteboard/core run lint && pnpm --filter @whiteboard/engine run lint && pnpm --filter @whiteboard/editor run lint && pnpm --filter @whiteboard/react run lint && pnpm --filter @whiteboard/collab run lint && pnpm -C apps/whiteboard run typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm run test:dataview && pnpm run test:whiteboard
scripts.test:whiteboard: pnpm --filter @whiteboard/core run test && pnpm --filter @whiteboard/engine run test && pnpm --filter @whiteboard/editor run test && pnpm --filter @whiteboard/react run test && pnpm --filter @whiteboard/collab run test
